response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. Audio phonetically matches the Japanese song 'Kokoro no Sakamichi' covered by Airani Iofifteen. 2. Reference JSON lyrics were null, so I relied on audio transcription and the burnt-in on-screen English subtitles for the song segment. 3. The first half of the video is dialogue-based merchandise promotion in Indonesian, English, and Japanese; I transcribed and translated all spoken content. 4. Timestamps are precisely aligned with the start and end of vocalizations, and mid-sentence pauses are handled by splitting blocks.

subtitles.original: Semua, terima kasih semuanya!
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you everyone!

subtitles.original: Ya akhirnya ya, Iofi's Birthday Celebration 2025 sudah di penghujung acara.
subtitles.english: Yes, finally, Iofi's Birthday Celebration 2025 has reached the end of the show.

subtitles.original: Tapi jangan skip Ads dulu!
subtitles.english: But don't skip the ads yet!

subtitles.original: Sebelum berakhir aku punya sesuatu untuk kalian.
subtitles.english: Before it ends, I have something for you.

subtitles.original: Dewa, Birthday Goods... Tada! Boom!
subtitles.english: Now, the Birthday Goods... Tada! Boom!

subtitles.original: Hai! Iofi's Birthday 2025! Kita punya 3 merch dan sesuatu yang spesial dan voice.
subtitles.english: Hi! Iofi's Birthday 2025! We have 3 merch, something special, and a voice pack.

subtitles.original: Mari kita lihat ya. Tantan!
subtitles.english: Let's take a look. Tantan!

subtitles.original: Hai! ioDreaming Blanket! I'll keep you warm 24/7.
subtitles.english: Hi! ioDreaming Blanket! I'll keep you warm 24/7.

subtitles.original: イオフィが暖かく包んであげるよ。こうやって、ギュッとね！暖かいからね。
subtitles.english: Iofi will wrap you up warmly. Like this, tightly! Because it's warm.

subtitles.original: Jadi kalau kalian aduh dingin, perlu ditemani hangat, ini aku akan menemani malam-malammu yang dingin.
subtitles.english: So if you're cold and need warm company, I'll accompany your cold nights.

subtitles.original: で、今年もイラストは夜ノみつきママ！ありがとう！皆様のママありがとう！
subtitles.english: And the illustration this year is by Yoru no Mitsuki-mama again! Thank you! Thank you to everyone's mama!

subtitles.original: Lucu kali, fuwafuwa, kawaii.
subtitles.english: It's so cute, fluffy, and lovely.

subtitles.original: Eh tapi kalau udah ada blanket berarti kurang apa sih?
subtitles.english: But if you already have a blanket, what's missing?

subtitles.original: Next! We have this one! Sweet Dreams Pillow Cover! Syaa!
subtitles.english: Next! We have this one! Sweet Dreams Pillow Cover! Syaa!

subtitles.original: Jadi ini selain... Tapi kayaknya kepala kalian bisa pas buat di...
subtitles.english: So this is besides... But it seems your head can fit right...

subtitles.original: Basically, it's so fluffy, it's so comfy. You can place your head right in... yeah!
subtitles.english: Basically, it's so fluffy and comfy. You can place your head right in... yeah!

subtitles.original: あの、これいいでしょ、こうやって。そうそう。
subtitles.english: Um, this is good, right? Like this. Yes, yes.

subtitles.original: でもでもでも、イオフィに夢中すぎてちょっと時間忘れちゃう。あ、やばいどうしようって言う時はこちらです！
subtitles.english: But but but, if you're too obsessed with Iofi and forget the time... 'Oh no, what should I do?' In those times, it's this!

subtitles.original: Hai! Jadi kalian kalau punya ini nggak akan lupa waktu.
subtitles.english: Hi! So if you have this, you won't forget the time.

subtitles.original: Aduh aku terlalu fokus sama Iofi, aku lupa waktu. Oh my god, ini!
subtitles.english: Oh, I'm too focused on Iofi, I forgot the time. Oh my god, this!

subtitles.original: So you won't really forget about time while thinking about me. Yeah!
subtitles.english: So you won't really forget the time while thinking about me. Yeah!

subtitles.original: 可愛いでしょ。はい！あ、でもでもでも、次次次次... 次はなんだなんだ？あ、こちらです！はい！どうぞ！
subtitles.english: Cute, right? Yes! Oh, but but but, next next next next... what's next? Ah, it's this! Here you go!

subtitles.original: Gini kita bisa ketemu di dalam mimpi. 'Dream Rendezvous'.
subtitles.english: This way, we can meet in a dream. 'Dream Rendezvous'.

subtitles.original: So you will be meeting me in a dream.
subtitles.english: So you'll be meeting me in a dream.

subtitles.original: そう、夢でも会えるように、このボイスを聞いてね！はい！
subtitles.english: Yes, so we can meet in dreams, please listen to this voice pack! Yes!

subtitles.original: ではあの、日本語、インドネシア語と英語三つです！はい！ぜひ聞いてね！
subtitles.english: It's in three languages: Japanese, Indonesian, and English! Please listen to it!

subtitles.original: ででで、今年が新しいのよ、新しいの出てくるのよ。
subtitles.english: And and and, there's something new this year, something new is coming out.

subtitles.original: There's gonna be something new this year and this is it! Pam!
subtitles.english: There's going to be something new this year, and this is it! Bam!

subtitles.original: The purchase of Birthday Merch Set comes with a bonus that can be used in the Hololive Official Card Game! Yeah!
subtitles.english: The purchase of the Birthday Merch Set comes with a bonus for the Hololive Official Card Game! Yeah!

subtitles.original: Ini sebagai bonus pemberian full set premium. Premium merchandise.
subtitles.english: This is a bonus for the premium full set. Premium merchandise.

subtitles.original: Akan tambahan bonus kartu yang bisa kalian pakai di gamenya official Hololive, guys! Yes!
subtitles.english: There will be an additional bonus card you can use in the official Hololive game, guys! Yes!

subtitles.original: You can actually use it on the game. Yeah!
subtitles.english: You can actually use it in the game. Yeah!

subtitles.original: これさ、大会とかで使ったらさ、めっちゃ自慢できますよ。こうやって、「うわ！これがイオフィの限定の誕生日グッズから出たんや！」って。
subtitles.english: If you use this in a tournament, you can really brag about it. Like, 'Whoa! This came from Iofi's limited birthday goods!'

subtitles.original: でもまあ、お守りとしてもね、ここに置いてても大丈夫ですよ。イオフィがここにいるから。
subtitles.english: But well, even as a lucky charm, it's fine to just keep it here. Because Iofi is here.

subtitles.original: Yeah! Jadi ini bonus bisa dipakai di kartu ya, di gamenya. Oshi Holomen Card.
subtitles.english: Yeah! So this bonus can be used for the card game. Oshi Holomen Card.

subtitles.original: Tapi kartunya hari ini yang ini sayang sekali baru ada bahasa Jepangnya jadi mohon pengertiannya ya.
subtitles.english: But unfortunately, this card is currently only available in Japanese, so please understand.

subtitles.original: Untuk detail kartu dan cara bermain bisa dicek di homepage. Begitu guys, terima kasih.
subtitles.english: Card details and how to play can be checked on the homepage. That's it guys, thank you.

subtitles.original: Dan kita sudah sampai di penghujung... acara.
subtitles.english: And we've reached the very end... of the show.

subtitles.original: Jadi karena tahun lalu kita udah dengar 'Here I Am' yang biasa, nah tahun ini aku punya yang spesial untuk kalian.
subtitles.english: Since we heard the regular 'Here I Am' last year, I have something special for you this year.

subtitles.original: 'Here I Am' full Bahasa Indonesia. Ah! 'Here I Am' Indonesian version.
subtitles.english: 'Here I Am' full Indonesian version. Ah! 'Here I Am' Indonesian version.

subtitles.original: でもそれはメンバーシップ限定です。メイン限限定で 'Here I Am' インドネシア語バージョン後で歌います。はい！
subtitles.english: But that's for membership only. I'll sing the Indonesian version of 'Here I Am' later, exclusively for members. Yes!

subtitles.original: Jadi habis ini akan... apa ya, aku akan ketemu kalian di membership. Oke?
subtitles.english: So after this... well, I'll see you in the membership stream. Okay?

subtitles.original: では、本当の本当の本当の最後の曲になります。はい！
subtitles.english: Now, it's time for the truly, truly, truly last song. Yes!

subtitles.original: This will be my last song for tonight.
subtitles.english: This will be my last song for tonight.

subtitles.original: I hope you're ready. This last song will be... 'Kokoro no Sakamichi'. Shuwa de.
subtitles.english: I hope you're ready. This last song will be... 'Kokoro no Sakamichi'. With sign language.

subtitles.original: 何度も苦しい思いをした
subtitles.english: I've been through pain more times than I can say

subtitles.original: 何度も悲しい思いもした
subtitles.english: I've felt the sorrow that wouldn't go away

subtitles.original: 今日までたくさん歩いてきた
subtitles.english: Step by step, I've made it here today

subtitles.original: 心の坂道を
subtitles.english: Up the hill where my feelings lay

subtitles.original: 歩きなれた帰り道
subtitles.english: I tripped and fell on the road I always take

subtitles.original: 突然転んだ
subtitles.english: Caught off guard, like a sudden break

subtitles.original: 不意打ちみたいで まるで裏切られた気分
subtitles.english: It hit me like a stab in the back
